items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers Gritty welcomes passengers from Raleigh at airport
items.description:
Gritty gave a brotherly welcome to passengers arriving from North Carolina on Wednesday.
The Philadelphia Flyers mascot and the team’s ice crew greeted passengers from Raleigh, North Carolina, the home of the Carolina Hurricanes, after they landed at Philadelphia International Airport.
At the gate, Gritty high-fived and waved to passengers

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Buffalo Sabres Game 1 recap May 6 2026
items.description: BUFFALO -- Josh Doan and Ryan McLeod each had a goal and an assist for the Buffalo Sabres, who defeated the Montreal Canadiens 4-2 in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Second Round at KeyBank Center on Wednesday.​

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs began Saturday with the Carolina Hurricanes defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-0. The second round continued on Sunday with the Colorado Avalanche defeating the Minnesota Wild 9-6.

items.headline: Kirby Dach Montreal Canadiens Game 1 diving goal
items.description:
Talk about an impressive second effort.
Late in the second period of Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Second Round on Wednesday, Kirby Dach scored a see-it-to-believe-it, acrobatic backhanded goal that left fans' jaws on the floor.

items.headline: Blade Gang gets Buffalo Sabres fans rolling before Game 1
items.description:
BUFFALO – The Blade Gang was making it look mean Wednesday, in the minutes leading up to Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Second Round against the Montreal Canadiens at KeyBank Center.

items.headline: NHL, NHLPA announce team payroll range for 2026-27 season
items.description: NEW YORK/TORONTO – The National Hockey League and the National Hockey League Players’ Association announced today that the Team Payroll Range established for the 2026-27 League Year, pursuant to the Collective Bargaining Agreement, provides for a Lower Limit of $76.9 million, a Midpoint of $90.4 million and an Upper Limit

items.headline: Boston Bruins top line center role top priority of offseason
items.description:
BOSTON -- It's been three years since Patrice Bergeron retired, and the Boston Bruins are still searching for his replacement.
Even as the Bruins took steps this season, even as they bounced back from finishing tied for the worst record in the Eastern Conference in 2024-25 and made the Stanley

items.headline: Rod Brind'Amour Rick Tocchet similar coaches at different career stages in playoffs
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Rod Brind'Amour has been back in Philadelphia before, as a player and a coach.

items.headline: Buffalo Zoo decorates for Sabres ahead of Round 2
items.description:
The Buffalo Zoo is partying like it’s 2007.
The celebrate the start of the Eastern Conference Second Round between the Buffalo Sabres and the Montreal Canadiens on Wednesday, the local animal park decorated its attractions with Sabres signs and gear.

items.headline: Sam Malinski's poise on display for Colorado in 2026 playoffs
items.description:
DENVER -- Sam Malinski sat at his stall, his bottom lip bloodied from a wayward puck he took to the mouth during Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round, the same game he scored the first Stanley Cup Playoff goal of his career.

items.headline: Noah Cates injury status update May 6 2026
items.description:
VOORHEES, N.J. -- Noah Cates will miss the remainder of the Eastern Conference Second Round for the Philadelphia Flyers because of a lower-body injury.
The center sustained the injury during a 3-2 overtime loss at the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 2 on Monday. He played 20:53, including 3:23 during overtime.

items.headline: Brock Faber's 2-way game key for Minnesota in West 2nd Round
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Brock Faber's two-way game is as important to the Minnesota Wild right now as it has ever been with the hole they're in after losing the first two games to the Colorado Avalanche in the Western Conference Second Round.
